title: Apply blue and green color scheme to entire website

requirements.summary: Update the CSS color palette in frontend/src/index.css to use blue and green as the primary color combination, replacing the current vibrant color system with harmonious blue and green tones
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette maintains sufficient contrast for accessibility
Both light and dark mode variants are updated with blue-green theme

file_operations.description: Replace the current vibrant color system (electric-blue, coral-pink, lime-green, sunshine-yellow, vivid-orange) with harmonious blue and green tones using the OKLCH color space. Update CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes including --primary (blue shades), --secondary (green shades), --accent (complementary blue-green), and other color variables while maintaining the existing OKLCH structure and accessibility contrast ratios.

requirements.summary: Apply the new blue and green color scheme consistently across all components including navigation, cards, buttons, links, hero sections, and interactive elements
acceptanceCriteria: All pages reflect the blue and green color theme
Navigation bar uses blue and green colors
Buttons and interactive elements follow the new color scheme
Hero sections and feature cards maintain visual consistency with the theme

file_operations.description: Review and ensure Tailwind configuration properly extends the new blue-green color system from CSS variables, verifying that all custom color utilities reference the updated OKLCH variables from index.css for consistent theming across components.
